original_text:
### Modular Assembly Conventions **[GENERAL — Solstice production rules]**
- Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color; **no margins outside the section** — assembly is direct stacking.
- Section metadata must declare: background color, whether the section establishes `dermatomyositis (DM)`, footnote symbols consumed (†, ‡ assigned at assembly to avoid collisions), and whether it contains a CTA.
- Footnote symbols: superscript, assigned in order of appearance at **assembly time** — sections use placeholder tokens (e.g., `{{fn1}}`) rather than hard-coded daggers when more than one referenced claim exists.
- Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team; sections adjacent to them must not include decorative elements that visually depend on what's above/below (e.g., a wave that's meant to continue into the footer).
- Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections (assembler responsibility, enabled by declared backgrounds).
- All colors in code as HEX; all sizing in px; inline CSS only (email client compatibility); `bgcolor` attributes duplicated for Outlook.

relations.note: Dark-section adjacency enforcement relies on the declared background color in section metadata.
Footnote assignment at assembly relies on declared consumed footnote symbols.

quotes: self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color
Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color; **no margins outside the section** — assembly is direct stacking.

rules.intent: Guarantee sections stack cleanly without external margins in email clients.
rules.rule_text: Each section is a self-contained <table>-based block at 600px (size.canvas.email_body_width_600 = 600px) with its own top/bottom 32px padding (section.padding.top_bottom = 32px) and a declared background color; there must be no margins outside the section — assembly is direct stacking.

quotes: Section metadata must declare: background color, whether the section establishes `dermatomyositis (DM)`, footnote symbols consumed (†, ‡ assigned at assembly to avoid collisions), and whether it contains a CTA.

rules.intent: Provide the assembler the data needed to stack, disambiguate footnotes, and validate DM establishment/CTA placement.

quotes: superscript, assigned in order of appearance at **assembly time**

Footnote symbols: superscript, assigned in order of appearance at **assembly time** — sections use placeholder tokens (e.g., `{{fn1}}`) rather than hard-coded daggers when more than one referenced claim exists.

rules.intent: Avoid footnote symbol collisions across independently-authored stacked sections.
rules.rule_text: Footnote symbols are superscript and assigned in order of appearance at assembly time; sections must use placeholder tokens (e.g., {{fn1}}) rather than hard-coded daggers when more than one referenced claim exists.

applies_when.value: adjacent to locked header, footer, or ISI

quotes: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team; sections adjacent to them must not include decorative elements that visually depend on what's above/below (e.g., a wave that's meant to continue into the footer).

rules.intent: Prevent broken decorative continuity since locked components are controlled by the core team.
rules.rule_text: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team; sections adjacent to them must not include decorative elements that visually depend on what's above/below (e.g., a wave that's meant to continue into the footer).

effect.reserved_for: not adjacent to another dark-background section
effect.subject: dark-background section

quotes: Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections
Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections (assembler responsibility, enabled by declared backgrounds).

rules.intent: Maintain visual rhythm and contrast between stacked sections.
rules.rule_text: Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections (assembler responsibility, enabled by declared backgrounds).

quotes: All colors in code as HEX; all sizing in px; inline CSS only (email client compatibility); `bgcolor` attributes duplicated for Outlook.
